headline: Built for TechSales
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to accelerate go-to-market strategies for B2B SaaS startups

challenges.title: Team Scaling Issues
challenges.desc: With only 3 employees and an 80% YoY decline, TechSales struggles to handle growing client demands in B2B SaaS. This limits rapid response to market changes in Portugal. Recruiting talent in a startup environment adds pressure.

challenges.title: Go-to-Market Strategies
challenges.desc: As a firm founded in 2023, TechSales faces hurdles in designing effective GTM plans for clients. Competition from larger firms demands precise execution. Adapting to B2B SaaS trends is essential for survival.

challenges.title: Sales Acceleration
challenges.desc: TechSales needs to boost sales for clients but lacks scalable tools. An 80% employee decline hampers consistent lead generation efforts. Integrating modern tech is key to sustaining growth.

challenges.title: Market Expansion
challenges.desc: Headquartered in Porto with a presence in Turkey, TechSales must navigate international markets. Cultural differences affect sales strategies for B2B SaaS. Building partner networks is vital for broader reach.

deliverables.title: AI Lead Generation System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated lead prioritization integrated with HubSpot to target B2B SaaS prospects. It connects with LinkedIn for outreach and tracks performance metrics.

deliverables.title: Sales Enablement Platform
deliverables.desc: Creates a centralized hub for sales content that personalizes pitches for clients. It integrates with existing CRM to monitor usage and improve team efficiency.

deliverables.title: Go-to-Market Framework
deliverables.desc: Develops custom strategies using AI to refine GTM plans for B2B SaaS startups. It links with partner networks for broader exposure and scales with team growth.

deliverables.title: Growth Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Constructs a dashboard that analyzes sales data to identify trends and opportunities. It integrates with tools like LinkedIn to forecast and optimize client outcomes.

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review TechSales' current sales tools and identify key pain points in B2B SaaS operations.

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop AI infrastructure tailored to go-to-market strategies and integrate with existing systems.

engagementSteps.title: Launch and Optimize
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy the system and monitor performance to ensure sustainable growth for TechSales clients.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It is a set of tools that use AI to automate and optimize sales processes for B2B SaaS companies.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with HubSpot?
faqItems.answer: The system connects directly with HubSpot to manage leads and track interactions seamlessly.

faqItems.question: Can it help with team scaling?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it automates routine tasks to allow your small team to handle more clients efficiently.

faqItems.question: What are the costs involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on customization, but we focus on ROI through improved sales acceleration.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typical implementation spans 3 months, aligned with our engagement steps.

faqItems.question: Is it suitable for startups?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it is designed for B2B SaaS startups like TechSales to drive growth from the ground up.

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages CRM and lead generation for sales teams

stackItems.name: LinkedIn
stackItems.role: Handles networking and prospecting for B2B outreach

stackItems.name: Gong
stackItems.role: Analyzes sales calls to improve enablement strategies

stackItems.name: VoiceLine
stackItems.role: Automates CRM updates via voice AI for field sales

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Provides additional CRM integration for scaling operations
